paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Minerva is a large language model trained on a high-quality dataset combining natural language with formal mathematical content, enabling it to solve quantitative reasoning problems through step-by-step reasoning and correct LaTeX notation without external tools
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Mathematical webpages (filtered for math content), arXiv preprints, general natural language data (same as PaLM pretraining)
raw_extraction.application: Solving mathematics and science problems, physics, chemistry, economics, and other STEM subjects at undergraduate level
raw_extraction.research_problem: Quantitative reasoning in natural language, including mathematics, science, and engineering problems requiring symbolic manipulation and computation
raw_extraction.paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Minerva 62B is a scaled-up version of the base model trained on a large technical dataset, achieving state-of-the-art performance on quantitative reasoning benchmarks through enhanced reasoning and calculation robustness
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Mathematical webpages (filtered for math content), arXiv preprints, general natural language data (same as PaLM pretraining)
raw_extraction.application: Solving mathematics and science problems, physics, chemistry, economics, and other STEM subjects at undergraduate level
raw_extraction.research_problem: Quantitative reasoning in natural language, including mathematics, science, and engineering problems requiring symbolic manipulation and computation
raw_extraction.paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models

raw_extraction.innovation: Minerva 540B is the largest model in the series, trained on 26B tokens from a high-quality technical dataset, demonstrating superior performance on complex quantitative reasoning tasks through extensive exposure to formal mathematical language and reasoning
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Mathematical webpages (filtered for math content), arXiv preprints, general natural language data (same as PaLM pretraining)
raw_extraction.application: Solving mathematics and science problems, physics, chemistry, economics, and other STEM subjects at undergraduate level
raw_extraction.research_problem: Quantitative reasoning in natural language, including mathematics, science, and engineering problems requiring symbolic manipulation and computation
raw_extraction.paper_title: Solving Quantitative Reasoning Problems with Language Models
